title: Coventry pupils hailed for school-grown veg in dinners
description: Students are more willing to try healthy meals when they grow the ingredients, a head teacher says.
content:
A school in Coventry where pupils grow their own fruit and vegetables for use in school meals said the approach made a "big difference", ahead of plans for an "overhaul, external" of school menus.

title: Pope Leo visits Algeria in sign of Africa’s growing importance to Catholic church
description: Pontiff makes first papal visit to country as he starts 11-day tour that will also include stops in Cameroon and Angola
content:
Pope Leo XIV has arrived in Algeria for the first papal visit to the country, calling for peace on the opening stop of a tour of Africa that signals the continent’s growing importance to the Catholic church.

title: Man took own life after Turkish dental visit left him toothless, UK inquest hears
description: Wife of Pawel Bukowski criticises care husband received over depression he suffered following failed procedure
content:
A man who took his own life was suffering from depression after a failed dental procedure in Turkey left him without any teeth, an inquest has heard.
Pawel Bukowski, a 48-year-old forklift driver, had travelled to a private clinic in the country in J... [2613 chars]

title: NHS improves genetic testing for minority ethnic cancer patients
description: Exclusive: Pre-chemotherapy tests previously did not look for gene variant that put some ethnicities at higher risk of serious side effects
content:
Thousands of cancer patients from minority ethnic backgrounds will have access to “groundbreaking” genetic testing on the NHS that previously discriminated against them.
